texto: Apprenticeship assumes that knowing a trade not only comes by numbers and outlines but also by watching and inhabiting. Knowing is found in these forms, because teaching is. We teach not only by our words and assignments but also by the manner of our words and the ways we ourselves already embody the assignments we give.
explicacao: Citação de Zack Eswine sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. “Apprenticeship assumes that knowing a trade not only comes by numbers and outlines but also by wa…” articula educacao, christianity, discipleship em registro de educacao, com relevância para contextos como discipleship e pastoral-ministry.
